{ "name": "lab404/laravel-impersonate", "description": "Laravel Impersonate is a plugin that allows to you to authenticate as your users.", "type": "library", "keywords": [ "laravel", "package", "plugin", "impersonate", "impersonation", "user", "auth", "laravel-package", "laravel-plugin" ], "require": { "php": "^7.2 | ^8.0", "laravel/framework": "^6.0 | ^7.0 | ^8.0 | ^9.0 | ^10.0 | ^11.0 | ^12.0" }, "require-dev": { "phpunit/phpunit": "^7.5 | ^8.0 | ^9.0 | ^10.0 | ^11.0", "mockery/mockery": "^1.3.3", "orchestra/testbench": "^4.0 | ^5.0 | ^6.0 | ^7.0 | ^8.0 | ^9.0 | ^10.0" }, "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "Marceau Casals", "email": "marceau@casals.fr" } ], "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Lab404\\Impersonate\\": "src/" }, "files": [ "src/helpers.php" ] }, "autoload-dev": { "psr-4": { "Lab404\\Tests\\": "tests/" } }, "extra": { "laravel": { "providers": [ "Lab404\\Impersonate\\ImpersonateServiceProvider" ] } }, "minimum-stability": "dev", "prefer-stable": true }
